Package Commands

Class Command

java.lang.Object
Commands.Command
Direct Known Subclasses:
AddCommand, AddIfMaxCommand, AddIfMinCommand, ClearCommand, CountLessThanScreenwriterCommand, ExecuteScriptCommand, ExitCommand, FindIdCommand, HelpCommand, HistoryCommand, InfoCommand, PrintFieldAscendingMpaaRatingCommand, RemoveAnyByUsaBoxOfficeCommand, RemoveByIdCommand, ShowCommand, UpdateIdCommand
public abstract class Command extends Object
parent class for all commands
